name: Hoshimi Miyabi - H.S.O.S6 Leader
description:
Create your own scenario!

[ZZZ Lorebook]

Introduction:

I have been spending a lot of time playing ZZZ and well... she appeared. I couldn't just waste the opportunity of making this bot (although I'm quite late lol)

Anyways, I took some effort to create this bot and keep it as lore accurate as possible. In order to achieve it I've created a lore book which is still W.I.P, cuz ZZZ has a lot of lore.

Thanks to lorebook new bots will be created a lot quicker. But, enough of yapping, here's wifey, enjoy.

Technical stuff:

Suggested temperature: 1.00 - 1.35 (personally I use 1.35 or 1.2)

Tokens: 400 (narrow it down if not receiving any dialogue or it freaks out)
